methods.name: create_channel
methods.desc:
Create a new alias channel box.
Caller pays MBR for the box.

methods.name: accept_channel
methods.desc:
Accept an existing alias channel by writing the acceptor's pubkey.
Only works if channel is in pending state. Acceptor must NOT be the creator (different sender).

methods.name: delete_channel
methods.desc:
Delete an alias channel box and refund the 44 500 µAlgo box MBR to the
caller.  The outer transaction must carry fee >= 2 * min_fee (2 000 µAlgo) so the inner payment can use fee=0 via fee pooling.

methods.name: read_channel
methods.desc:
Read an alias channel box.
Returns the full 73-byte box contents.
